3300380.name: Train Jumper
3300380.description:
In Train Jumper, you don’t control a pre-built railway – you develop your own transport system. Each wagon has a destination. Your task: combine the right classes, build functional train chains, and deliver them efficiently to the correct station.

With your earnings, you invest in new wagons and more powerful trains to master increasingly complex routes and challenges.

🚂 Different wagon types with unique characteristics
💰 Economy system with progression
🧠 Strategic building instead of simple driving
📈 Increasing complexity through new combinations

Support the ongoing development and grow together with the game.

Step aboard and set your railway empire in motion.
